query:
-- Delete duplicates where there's another record with the same title that has a fileUrl
DELETE FROM secure_documents 
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT sd1.id 
    FROM secure_documents sd1
    WHERE EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM secure_documents sd2 
      WHERE sd2.title = sd1.title 
      AND sd2.id != sd1.id 
      AND sd2.fileUrl IS NOT NULL 
      AND sd2.fileUrl != ''
    )
    AND (sd1.fileUrl IS NULL OR sd1.fileUrl = '')
  ) as duplicates
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute -- Delete duplicates where there's another record with the same title that has a fileUrl
DELETE FROM secure_documents 
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT sd1.id 
    FROM secure_documents sd1
    WHERE EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM secure_documents sd2 
      WHERE sd2.title = sd1.title 
      AND sd2.id != sd1.id 
      AND sd2.fileUrl IS NOT NULL 
      AND sd2.fileUrl != ''
    )
    AND (sd1.fileUrl IS NULL OR sd1.fileUrl = '')
  ) as duplicates
